2026-0668
2026-06-22PSForeign Influence Transparency and Accountability ActAppointment of the Foreign Influence Transparency CommissionerAppointment of Anton Boegman of Victoria, British Columbia, to be Foreign Influence Transparency Commissioner, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of seven years, effective august 4, 2026.N/A
act: Foreign Influence Transparency and Accountability Act
subject: Appointment of the Foreign Influence Transparency Commissioner
precis: Appointment of Anton Boegman of Victoria, British Columbia, to be Foreign Influence Transparency Commissioner, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of seven years, effective august 4, 2026.
